visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a 2D animation of a bald, pale-skinned character lying on a blue pillow against a wood-paneled wall. He is wearing a black shirt and exhibits a slight blush on his cheeks while staring upward. (2) The camera zooms in on his face; his eyes widen and the blush deepens, indicating a state of internal reflection or anxiety. (3) The character is then shown in a medium shot, standing near a brown wooden door, then looking thoughtfully towards the side. (4) A transition occurs to a scene with a pinkish background where the character appears to be recalling an interaction, followed by a cut to him sitting at a desk with a laptop. (5) On the screen, a webpage titled in Chinese with an icon of a leaf is shown, which he scrolls through. (6) The character is seen in a dark room, then sitting at a table with various small figures and a picture of himself in the background. (7) A close-up shot of a blue smartphone screen shows a messaging interface with a keyboard and typing activity. (8) A different character with black hair is introduced, sitting on a bus with green seats, holding a red smartphone. (9) The screen cuts to a split-screen view with a red background on one side and blue on the other, showing both characters engaged in a phone call. (10) The dark-haired character is shown in a close-up against a bright, shimmering background with soft bokeh effects as he speaks into his phone. (11) The final sequence returns to the bald character looking shocked and yelling into his phone as a black-and-white speed-line effect appears behind him.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我現在不是單身了對吧. (2) [Subtitle]: 好奇怪的感覺. (3) [Subtitle]: 感覺內心暖呼呼的. (4) [Subtitle]: 然後心臟一直狂跳. (5) [Subtitle]: 會不會是心臟病. (6) [Subtitle]: 閉嘴啦. (7) [Subtitle]: 那交往之後要做什麼?. (8) [Subtitle]: 第一次交往不知道要幹嘛欸. (9) [Subtitle]: 感覺也只能跟平常一樣啊. (10) [Subtitle]: 還是平常的對話之餘. (11) [Subtitle]: 要加些什麼東西嗎. (12) [Subtitle]: 嗨 學長. (13) [Subtitle]: 鏘. (14) [Subtitle]: 而且我們都是男的. (15) [Subtitle]: 好像也不能太過招搖. (16) [Subtitle]: 不然 先查查好了. (17) [Subtitle]: 於是我就在網路上搜尋. (18) [Logo]: 阿啾小劇場. (19) [Subtitle]: 第一次交往要怎麼辦. (20) [Subtitle]: 到底多困擾. (21) [Subtitle]: 歡迎來到情場高手小葉的戀愛諮詢室. (22) [Subtitle]: 給第一次交往的你……. (23) [Subtitle]: 這也是什麼超陽春網站. (24) [Subtitle]: 給第一次交往的你 可以先從改稱呼開始. (25) [Subtitle]: 例如說叫對方 親愛的 baby. (26) [Subtitle]: 或是為他取一個專屬於他的名號 叉叉寶貝. (27) [Subtitle]: 叉叉自行填上. (28) [Subtitle]: 叉叉寶貝聽起來也太母湯了吧. (29) [Variety]: 哪裡母湯. (30) [Subtitle]: 好 試試看好了. (31) [Subtitle]: 我上車了喔!. (32) [Subtitle]: 學長寶...寶. (33) [Subtitle]: 嗯? 阿啾給我傳訊息. (34) [Subtitle]: 是問我到家了嗎?. (35) [Variety]: 學長寶雅生活館. (36) [Subtitle]: 學長寶雅生活館. (37) [Subtitle]: 喂 什麼寶雅 你要逛寶雅喔. (38) [Subtitle]: 欸欸 那個 就是. (39) [Subtitle]: 我偶爾會去寶雅醞釀便意. (40) [Variety]: 到底在聊什麼. (41) [Subtitle]: 你便秘嗎? 沒有啦 不要理我. (42) [Subtitle]: 喔對了 我快到新竹了 謝謝你耶. (43) [Subtitle]: 啊 謝什麼. (44) [Subtitle]: 讓你等了20年 當你在身邊的時候 就算一句話都不說 我也能享受到那種安心踏實的感覺. (45) [Subtitle]: 以後也請多多指教喔. (46) [Subtitle]: 媽的你就是情場高手小葉吧!. (47) [Variety]: 誰啦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main animated male characters, Achuan and his Senior.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One character is bald with a round head, often seen blushing. The second character has short black hair and a more composed appearance.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A wood-textured bedroom wall, a bus interior with green seating, and various stylized digital or abstract backgrounds representing emotions.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, energetic male voice (Achuan) speaking quickly over a bright, rhythmic acoustic guitar and piano BGM. (2) A transition whoosh SFX marks a shift in the internal monologue. (3) A series of digital UI click and notification sound effects occur as the protagonist searches the internet and uses his smartphone. (4) The BGM continues as a second male voice (Senior) enters with a lower, calmer, and more resonant tone, contrasting with Achuan's frantic delivery. (5) A sharp 'ding' sound effect is used to emphasize a comedic realization. (6) During a phone call, the background music swells slightly into a warmer, sentimental piano melody as the Senior delivers a romantic line. (7) The video ends with a sudden increase in vocal intensity from Achuan, shouting a line with high arousal, followed by a quick audio cut.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience with a comedic animated story about the awkwardness of a first relationship and the humorous failure of using suggested pet names.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a classic 2D animation style with exaggerated expressions to drive comedy. The humor relies on the contrast between the two male characters' personalities.
